title: hydrangea umbellata
intro: Hydrangea umbellata, also known as the mountain hydrangea, is a shrub native to the mountainous regions of eastern Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, as well as its ability to treat digestive issues. The health benefits of hydrangea umbellata include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of hydrangea umbellata include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or extracting the active compounds with a solvent.
